hooks.command: cd /home/user/Liste_de_datas && git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^src/' && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const p=pkg.version.split('.');p[2]=String(Number(p[2])+1);pkg.version=p.join('.');fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n');console.log('Version mise à jour: '+pkg.version);" || true
hooks.statusMessage: Mise à jour de la version…
